mapper.select: /* 사용자 목록 조회 */ SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NM, U.EMAIL, U.PASSWD, U.PHONE, U.ORG_ID, U.USE_YN, U.LAST_LOGIN_DT, U.PWD_CHG_DT, U.LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, U.TWO_FA_YN, U.ACC_TP, U.ACCT_STATUS_CD, U.LOCK_DT, U.CREATE_DT, U.MODIFY_DT, U.CRTR_ID, U.MDFR_ID FROM TB_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY U.CREATE_DT DESC
